textByHash.38a35f51777896c0b0cfd2ce1af350e010f35369: Good day! I don't suppose I could trouble you for the briefest of moments?
textByHash.cd4aee83a0303be6d3651e5e7a5a90dcd14093c8: Ah, on second thoughts, you may not be cut out for this job.
textByHash.d6676f7860c8d21f3abd9aee0a36cebcd8f46807: How does access to a rather fancy party sound as a motivator?
textByHash.cfbf004881c155ef8166b4056927a26ce603c67e: I'm sure I can also rustle up some payment to encourange you, if you have any reservations.
textByHash.e9b5f72cb8cbd74ade859d36ca5cbfd77190e527: You may even find some... exciting opportunities inside, given the presence of some of Aldarin's wealthiest citizens!
textByHash.458e03a8c70dad0c7d4591f64cf77c3d2d59758f: Alas, I am, quite unfortunately, not rich in money. What I do possess is a certain wealth...
textByHash.0017f3571b38565c73e96675ce39122c15d33fdb: ... of talent! For you see I am... an actor! Patzi the Grand, they'll call me... eventually.
textByHash.297572b8f72100d514979688b04f76fa23b00c1e: Cutting words, but you need not worry. While you won't be getting paid upfront, I have a feeling that if all goes well, I will soon find myself with more than enough wealth to handsomely reward you.
textByHash.46d389e2476c5f062e318cc698b9fbdcd2ed2bb9: And besides, if nothing else, I'm sure you'll have a wonderful time at the party!
textByHash.06545302a3fede6a22c8be4ac633a5ab3754b48a: Sometimes a man has to follow his heart... and a second hand invitation saying there's a party at Villa Lucens tonight.
textByHash.02d84645e4434139f8336d4f1eb3b8bc84e04adf: Yes! The villa is home to an almighty patron of the arts! He even has his own theatre atop the cliffs behind the villa! In fact, the whole reason for this party is because he's showing his new play!
textByHash.5933d9740710b755e0008d919f988d4b2258cb55: This opportunity came about quite suddenly. As such, I'm unfortunately not as prepared as I otherwise would be. However, an actor like myself can't turn down the chance to meet with a man like him.
textByHash.cb07102dd49f79bc422ad46a69c862c1864fe188: Well said, Adala. Oh that reminds me, , this is Adala. She's also helping me out today!
textByHash.cea79bfa4426973840c1234a9fd35bec9cc14f59: She advertised herself as a bag carrier, so she's here to move my bag around. There's a lot of costumes and props that I travel with, so it's nice to have someone else carry them.
textByHash.8bb4158542d06fd6765cd80e2184ce05f57f053a: As for your part in all this, , with this being a fancy party and all, I'm going to need a butler to help me fit in.
textByHash.1969cbb417a018b1261c2ac75001117e6e896ac4: You know, serving me wine and tending to my needs. Fancy suit and all?
textByHash.85888c89d2deaa9087e5afc8b6b624380069323d: Oh I'm sure you will. You'll just have to act a little here and there!
textByHash.b0cc4e9d908504520e05bfcba841f5f887444114: I don't believe I do. I don't really take roles like that these days.
textByHash.98b2613ae7072a4e1af89c1c35a52dceb2d41300: Hmm... Maybe I should add a butler's uniform to my vast array of costumes after all.
textByHash.c89e6f0d3404ef45ffa4e239fb8ec31630e6f544: Quite unfortunate. In that case, please make sure to keep an eye out for me at your local theatre. I'll be a star soon!
textByHash.79714b393d5418321b882bb52ca8b6012954d690: Hello again! Are you feeling more in the partying spirit now?
textByHash.bf9c3f8929297e25934a144423afcd7d0b056258: Yes, I suppose so! Either way, Adala should be able to help you get your hands on one.
textByHash.ad5280e9014e7d2cf1b681beb5e34748dbc81781: Oh, she's in a rush, isn't she?
textByHash.153a8abc9914012d300dfb859cb5d91ac04455a0: Well, she sets a good example. You should probably be heading on in yourself.
textByHash.b8664d89beee217cd15adcf0698059c294678d31: You'll have to go in through the staff entrance, unfortunately. I can't be seen entering with the help.
textByHash.7c6c68e81d47de72aa32c3f5a90d98deeb1ce522: You will have to use the staff entrance though.
textByHash.d3817007b721932a8c32b25af0e7e795cd1042eb: I'll bet Adala went through it. You should've followed her! I think she headed somewhere along that hedgerow.
textByHash.96f0bcaadb583acd492ce72a39509b293a620d09: I'm guessing Adala went through it. I think she headed somewhere along that hedgerow.
textByHash.db49d0678a0236a0f3b50011283ede7724f2781e: You made it in, and don't you look the part! Magnificent!
textByHash.bfff083ca6a00e42b0f9a9cde0ffe448b3d8fb6c: Nonsense! Now, why not go and introduce yourself to our host and the other guests? I could do with knowing a little more about everyone.
textByHash.35d091d860cf471ee64a0f93829311a7ed3ecabc: I'm sure you can get their names at least. That will give me something to work with.
textByHash.0bbef114810c788249dc5203b59d40a737856b27: No, no. I think you're doing more than enough right now, thank you.
textByHash.659af133e1757227a3963a93f92b71a95a333bd2: I saw you make your way around the party! So then, who's who?
textByHash.be5ba033b67e04df60f4ecae66154675cabec2b6: Pfft, invited? I have an invitation and I can act like I belong here! He'll never know!
textByHash.f58357bdb0e52408e408608c1f59bb7b2a88b263: Sponsoring... me? How marvellous! Oh I think I should have a drink to celebrate! Could you be a dear and go into the wine cellar for me?
textByHash.81f7c30bd880aff611ab82bfaf4c8b341ccfdc9e: Whilst that sounds lovely, I've heard there's some Principum Red down there! It's not produced any more so is rather hard to find, but our generous host seems happy enough to share.
textByHash.4a55b7dddda9ed27d7f8437bd41acb427d42e593: Did you manage to find that wine yet?
textByHash.c70872c02d3b88bc55f09f76f7caeb4918e11609: Remember, you're looking for Principum Red. I'm sure it will be labelled.
textByHash.7cbbaed70965a71f58e75f8e24d30f2eb948caf4: Oh, this is exciting isn't it!
textByHash.78a91f73394b2ed6c369383a781526653bb2e81e: Did you at least manage to find what I sent you down there for?
textByHash.01f3ccf33a56a1b4abc1952b2cb3db3e941a6d1d: It's a shame we're locked down up here. I'd love to try it! I came so close too, if it weren't for that actor...
textByHash.2db649be5037bda6b6aed5e590bb7db0dbb819db: Of course not! I'm just ruing a missed chance to try that wine...
textByHash.d090773a3c5f8ef254c97d5e12f84a87f414a0c4: But why would I need to remove the competition if he was already open to sponsoring me anyway? That doesn't make sense...
textByHash.dd93e6606a39c9fb5e658a3bdf7f6476c9c65700: But why? Constantinius was open to sponsoring me anyway. I didn't need to kill anyone...
textByHash.697f5f48070151984ce8d5763020b0ca3ae4e370: Haven't you already tried to accuse me?
textByHash.0bcc20cdb2829114f5cedc546f581e9cc3f7a101: No thanks to you! This was meant to be a big moment for me, and you totally upstaged me!
textByHash.7b7a47c667557a34f08318606d0d74de3651e05d: I hired you to make me look better!
